# Security Policy

SAP takes security bugs in this repository seriously. We appreciate your efforts to
responsibly disclose your findings.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security-related findings.**

Please report security vulnerabilities via SAP's official channel:

- SAP Trust Center: https://www.sap.com/about/trust-center/security/incident-management.html

Include as much of the following as possible so we can triage quickly:

- A clear description of the issue and the affected component(s) of this sample
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof-of-concept
- The impact you believe the issue has
- Any suggested mitigation, if known

We will acknowledge receipt and follow up with next steps.

## Scope

This repository contains a *sample* application intended for learning and trial
use with SAP HANA Cloud. It is not a supported SAP product. Issues that depend on
modifying the sample's source code locally before exploiting it are generally out
of scope; issues in the sample's default configuration that could mislead users
into insecure deployments are in scope.

## Supported Versions

Only the `main` branch receives updates. Older tags and forks are not maintained.
